ul.li: I/O Strategy: Synchronization occurs via the fuse_ko request queue.
Memory: Zero-copy supported via splice() on specific kernels.
Latency: Double context switch per I/O operation (App -> Kernel -> Daemon).
Isolation: Filesystem crashes in the Daemon do not panic the Host Kernel.

g.text: write(int fd, const void *buf, size_t count)
fs_read(struct fs*, uint64_t inode, off_t, void*, size_t)
fs_write(struct fs*, uint64_t inode, off_t, const void*, size_t)
vfs_write(struct file*, const char*, size_t, loff_t*)
